CreateService.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string with a maximum length of 64 characters
CreateService.name: Name of the service endpoint; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, and special characters -_/.; must start with a letter; length 1-65
CreateService.description: Description of the service endpoint; maximum 200 characters
CreateService.serviceName: Corresponding service name; supports uppercase/lowercase letters and digits; length 1-65
CreateService.instanceId: Bound instance ID; currently only supports binding to BLB
CreateService.authList: User authorization list; all requests are denied by default
CreateService.authList.uid: User ID; use "*" to represent all users
CreateService.authList.auth: Authentication action; valid values: allow/deny, indicating permit/deny respectively
